text: Hello. Hello. Hello. Are you there? Oh, I'm not scamming you at all. I'm actually calling because there may be pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through your state's relief program. And I genuinely just want to help you get those sorted out. You're on both Part A and B, aren't you? Can you hear me? I was just asking if you have Medicare Part A and Part B.
